Localization.Description: Sabrul to rule CVE_2023_4911_GLIBC_Buffer_Overflow. The rule detects local privilege escalation via a buffer overflow. Attackers using the CVE-2023-4911 vulnerability can start SUID programs to execute code with elevated privileges

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Multiple executions of SUID-program {object.process.name} by user {subject.account.name} were detected, indicating a buffer overflow attempt on host {event_src.host}
